name: Emotion Recognition in Signers

description: arXiv:2512.15376v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Recognition of signers' emotions suffers from one theoretical challenge and one practical challenge, namely, the overlap between grammatical and affective facial expressions and the scarcity of data for model training. This paper addresses these two challenges in a cross-lingual setting using our eJSL dataset, a new benchmark dataset for...
author: Kotaro Funakoshi, Yaoxiong Zhu
